metadata.description: Transparent refraction shader - requires complex math

summary: Refractive transparent surfaces (glass, water). Maps to transparent/glass material with IOR.

parameters.Color: Transparency color (usually white or light tint)
parameters.IOR: Index of refraction (1.45 for glass, 1.33 for water)

implementation.approach: Use Transparent Lit or custom refraction shader
implementation.ior_handling: Affects refraction angle - difficult to implement in standard ShaderGraph

limitations: Accurate refraction requires per-pixel screen reading or complex math
compatibility_loss_40_percent: Full IOR-based refraction is complex; simplified approximations used instead
